scripts.dev:testnet: bash -lc 'set -a; if [ -f ./.env.testnet ]; then . ./.env.testnet; fi; set +a; tsx watch src/index.ts'
scripts.patch-recent: bash -lc 'set -a; if [ -f ./.env ]; then . ./.env; fi; set +a; tsx src/patchRecentPrices.ts'
scripts.start:testnet: bash -lc 'set -a; if [ -f ./.env.testnet ]; then . ./.env.testnet; fi; set +a; tsx src/index.ts'
